short_description: Use Developer Dashboard to bring a live Codex workspace onto Even glasses.
about: D2-Codex pairs the active Developer Dashboard workspace with a Codex session and turns that pairing into a readable glasses companion. It also introduces the wider Developer Dashboard ecosystem for daily AI-assisted operations, skill management, and fast UI creation around local workflows. Install Developer Dashboard with curl https://raw.githubusercontent.com/manif3station/developer-dashboard/refs/heads/master/install.sh | sh and keep up with updates at https://michael.vu.
